title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
